message:
You know that one friend who panics at the slightest hint of danger? Yeah, that’s me. Recently, I was cooking dinner and got a little too caught up in a show while I was sautéing some veggies. Suddenly, I smelled smoke and my heart raced. I dashed to the kitchen, ready to unleash my inner firefighter, only to find my friend waving a towel at the smoke rising from my pan. 

In that moment, I realized how important it is to have a solid escape plan and keep our smoke alarms in check. It’s easy to get lost in the moment (or a great episode), but being prepared helps keep the calm in chaotic moments! 

Have you ever had a kitchen mishap that turned into a funny story? This little refresher helped me remember the basics!
